basic_details.job_title: Sadar Hospital Giridih Arogya Mitra Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Sadar Hospital Giridih (SHG) Arogya Mitra Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the SHG Arogya Mitra Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: Intermediate/Graduation from a recognized Board of Education, ADCA processing fluent communication skills in english/ Hindi and Local language, Work Experience (Six - Month), having adequate functional computer literacy which shall include understanding of MS Office suite and navigating through internet portals
qualification.details: Intermediate/Graduation from a recognized Board of Education. ADCA processing fluent communication skills in English/ Hindi and Local language. Work Experience: Six months. Adequate functional computer literacy which shall include understanding of MS Office suite and navigating through internet portals.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for Sadar Hospital Giridih Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Arogya Mitra. There are 4 vacancies available for this position.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates do not need to apply online; they can directly attend the interview.

faq.question: Q3. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled from 27 May 2026 to 31 May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for Arogya Mitra?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years and the maximum age limit is 40 years for the Arogya Mitra post.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for Arogya Mitra?
faq.answer: Candidates should have Intermediate/Graduation from a recognized Board, ADCA, fluent communication skills, and six months of work experience with computer literacy.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Arogya Mitra post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 120 per patient.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Sadar Hospital Giridih Arogya Mitra Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Computer Skill Test and a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Official Notification PDF" link in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.
